verses.text: Jessi' tapa David, milianpi a suak mipa, Jakob' Pasian' sathau nilhpa, Israel laphuak siampa David' kam nunungte hih bang ahi hi
“ Topa' kha in kei tung tawnin thu hong gen a, ka kam sungah ama thugente om hi
Israel Pasian kampau khin a, Israel a hupa in kei kiangah hong ci khin hi: Mi khat in mite tungah thutang takin ukin Pasian zahtakna tawh limtakin a uk ciangin
amah pen amaute tungah zingsang khuavak bangin taang ziazua a, meii kaai loh ni zingsanga ni taangkhia, leilak panin lopate a selsak guahtui tawh kibang hi

Hi hi, ka innkuan zong Pasian tawh tua bangmah hilo ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in tawntung thuciamna kei tawh hong bawl a, na khempeuh a hoih a kipin hih hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah hong huhin, ka deihna khempeuh tangtungsak ding hilo ahi hiam
Ahih hangin mi gilote ahih leh a kilawnkhia lingkungte tawh kibang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khut guak tawh amaute kilawng ngamlo a
amaute a lawng ding mipa pen sik leh teipi bul tawh kithawi a, amaute mei tawh kihaltum siang hi,” a ci hi.
David' neih mi thahatte' minte: Tahkhemon mi Joshebbasshebeth hi a, amah pen mi thumte a ukpa ahi hi. Amah in a teipi tawh mihing za giat do-in hun khat sungin thatmang khin hi
Tua ciangin mi thahat thumte lakah amah a zompa pen Ahoah mi Dodo' tapa Eleazar ahi hi. Galsim dingin a kikaikhawm Filistia-te to a, Israel mite a nungkik hunin David tawh amah om hi

Amah dingin a khut a hikcip mateng Filistia-te sattuk a, a namsau a khutsungah omcip hi. Topa in tua ni-in gualzawhna lianpi piangsak a, a kithat mite' na a tawm ding bekin ama nungah mite hong paikik uh hi
Ama zomah Harar mi Agee' tapa Shammah ahi hi. Besan a dimna mun Lehi-ah Filistia-te kikaikhawm uh a, Filistia-te' kiang panin mite tai uh hi
Ahih hangin amah in tua munah pan'mun la-in hu a, Filistia-te that a, Topa in gualzawhna lianpi a piangsak hi
Ukpa sawmthumte lak panin mi thumte paisukin, Refaim kuamah Filistia mihonte in giahphual satin a om laitakin, Adullam leihawm-a David kiangah anlak hun pawlin tung uh hi
Tua hunin munmuan'huai sungah David om a, Filistia khuacingte Bethlehem-ah om uh hi
David in lunggulhna tawh, “Kulhkongpi gei-a om Bethlehem tuikhuk panin mi khat in tuidawn ding kei hong pia leh!” a ci hi

Tua ciangin mi thahat thumte in Filistia-te' giahphual phulin kulhkongpi gei-a om Bethlehem tuikhuk panin tui tawikhia uh a, a tui la-in David kiangah paipih uh hi. Ahih hangin David in a tui dawnlo hi. Amah in Topa-a' dingin a tui sung a
“ Topa aw, hih tui ka dawn het kei ding hi. Amau' nuntakna khamin a pai mite' sisan a dawn tawh ka kibang hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in dawnlo hi. Mi thahat thumte' han'zia tu-a bang ahi hi
Tu-in Zeruiah' tapa, Joab' sanggampa Abishai, mihing sawmthumte a ukpa ahi hi. Amah in a teipi tawh mihing za thumte do-in amaute that a, mihing sawmthumte' banah minphatna ngahbeh hi
Mihing sawmthumte sung pan amah a minthang pen hi a, amaute a ukpa a suak hi. Ahih hangin amah in mihing thumte ban nailo hi

Jehoiada' tapa, Kabzeel khuami Benaiah pen gal a hang, na lianpite a sempa hi a, amah in Moab galhang mi nih a vat hi. Amah zong paisukin vuk a kiat ni khatin leihawm sunga om humpinelkai khat a that hi

Amah in a melhoih Egypt mi khat a that hi. Egypt mipa in a khutsungah teipi tawi hi. Ahih hangin Benaiah ciangkhut khat tawh ama kiangah paisuk a, Egypt-pa' khutsung panin a teipi sutkhia-in ama teipi mah tawh amah a that hi
Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah in hihte hihin, a thahat mi thumte' minphatna zah phial a ngah hi
Mihing sawmthumte' lakah amah minthang a, ahih hangin amah in mihing thumte ban nailo hi. David in amah a cingte a ukin a koih hi
Joab' sanggampa Asahel zong sawmthumte' lakah khat ahi hi. Bethlehem mi Dodo' tapa Elhanan
Harod khuami Shammah, Harod khuami Elika
Palti mi Helez, Tekoa khuami Ikkesh' tapa Ira
Anathoth khuami Abiezer, Hushah mi Mebunnai
Ahoah mi Zalmon, Netofah khuami Maharai
Netofah khuami Baanah' tapa Heleb, Benjamin mite' gamsunga om Gibeah khuami Ribai' tapa Ittai
Pirathon khuami Benaiah, Gaash gei-a kuam pan Hiddai
Betharabah khuami Abialbon, Bahurim khuami Azmaveth
Shaalbon khuami Eliahba, Jashen' tapate, Jonathan
Harar mi Shammah, Harar mi Sharar' tapa Ahiam
Maakah khuami Ahasbai' tapa Elifelet, Gilo khuami Ahithofel' tapa Eliam
Karmel khuami Hezro, Arbi mi Paarai
Zobah khuami Nathan' tapa Igal, Gad mi Bani
Ammon mi Zelek, Zeruiah' tapa galhiam a tawi Beeroth khuami Naharai
Ithri mi Ira, Ithri mi Gareb
Hit mi Uriah, a vekpi-in sawmthumlesagih ahi uh hi.
